servinfo.title: Rear Wheel Hub Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Wheel Hub and Suspension Knuckle Components:Rear

s1.ptxt: Hoist vehicle and remove rear wheel.
Release caulking from drive shaft nut and remove drive shaft nut with brake pedal depressed.
Disconnect connector from rear wheel speed sensor.
Remove rear wheel hub assembly bolts (1), and then remove rear wheel hub assembly and rear brake disc dust cover from rear axle.

attention3.ptxt: Lightly tap shaft end of wheel hub side when it is difficult to remove rear drive shaft assembly.

s1.ptxt: Remove hub bolts (1) with hydraulic press, if necessary.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Insert hub bolts (1) in hub holes. Rotate hub bolts slowly to assure that serrations are aligned with those made by original bolts.

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new hub bolts.

item.ptxt: Apply grease to mating surface of rear wheel hub assembly and drive shaft.
Tighten new rear wheel hub assembly bolts to specified torque.
Tighten drive shaft nut to specified torque and caulk drive shaft nut.

attention2.ptxt: Be sure to use new drive shaft nut.

item.ptxt: Tighten wheel nuts to specified torque.
